snippet.title: Fanda - NEHA KAKKAR, PARTYTONYT | Official Video
snippet.description:
Poetic Rabbit proudly presents FANDA by NEHA KAKKAR & PARTYTONYT, featuring Eva Giri & Swanky Shiv.

snippet.title: Mirzapur The Movie | Official Hindi Teaser | Pankaj Tripathi | Ali Fazal | Divyenndu | 4th Sept
snippet.description:
Witness the epic untold story, this September. Get ready for bhaukaal on the big screen. 

Watch #MirzapurTheMovie only in cinemas on 4th September in Hindi & Telugu

इस सितंबर, एक ज़बरदस्त अनकही कहानी देखें। भौकाल के लिए तैयार हो जाइए बड़े पर्दे पर 

#MirzapurTheMovie देखें 4 सितंबर से सिर्फ सिनेमाघरों में हिंदी और तेलुगु में।

Amazon MGM Studios & Excel Entertainment Present

An Excel Entertainment Production
MIRZAPUR THE MOVIE

Releasing only in cinemas in Hindi & Telugu on 4th September 2026

Featuring:
Ali Fazal
Pankaj Tripathi

snippet.title: BardiyaKo Bagh [Child Version]- Kamal BC Maldai & Aakriti Rai - Mariya Gurung - New Nepali Song 2026
snippet.description:
Kamal BC Maldai Presents:-
BardiyaKo Bagh

--------------------------------------
#BardiyaKoBagh #kamalbcmaldai #KataKata #KamalBC #NepaliSong #NepaliMusic #LokDohori #TrendingNepaliSong #chldversion #aakritirai #bhojpurenani #bhojpureraini

🎶 Audio Credits:- 

♬ Song:- 
Bardiya Ko Bagh

♬ Vocal:-
Kamal BC Maldai
Aakriti Rai

♬ Lyrics/ Music :- 
Kamal BC Maldai

♬ Music Arranger :- 
Bishwas Nepal

♬ Mix/Mastering :- 
Shyam Swet Rasaili

♬ Studio :- 
Prisma Recording Studio KTM

♬ Audio | Video:- 
Kamal BC Maldai
+977-9851240302
----------------------------------------------

🎬️ Video Credits:- 

🎬 Cast :- 
Kamal BC Maldai
Aakriti Rai
Mariya Gurung

🎬 Director | Cinematographer:- 
Prakash Khadka & Team

🎬 Editor | Colorist:- 
Manoj Karki

🎬 MUA:- 
Sangita Chand Thakuri

BLESSED
MAN BAHADUR BUDHA (FATHER) 
TOPKALA BUDHA  (MOTHER)

SPECIAL THANKS :-
Bijay Rai
Chitra Bahadur Gurung
Manju Gurung
Anjana Gurung
Suk Bahadur Gurung
Amita Gurung
Sanju Gurung
Anju Gurung


--------------------------------------------

Lyrics :-

बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 
बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

घर त मेरो यहाँ हैन बाँके बर्दिया 
तिम्रो रुपले ए कान्छि दिलै चोर्दिया

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

माईला दाई हजुर, केछ केटा हो हल्लिचल्ली
ठिक छ दाई, दामी दामी दामी 
कता हो हामी ?

बर्दियामा हो दाई कता जानू खै 
पाँच बर्ष लभ परेको गर्लफ्रेन्ड पोइल गै 
हाहाहा ... हाहाहा..
मान्छे बौलाएसी कस्को के लाग्छ र खै 

भेट्न आउछु भन्थी मलाई कोहलपुरको चोकमा 
एक कार्टुन रक्सी खाएँ मैले रिसको झोकमा 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

कता कता - यता यता 
कता कता - यता यता 

तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म 
तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म

Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Gharta mero yaha hoina banke Bardiya 
Timro ruple e kanxi dilai chordiya

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Maila dai hajur kexa keTa ho hallichalli
Thik xa dai dami dami dami 
Kata ho hami 
Bardiyama ho dai kata janu khai

Vetna aauxu vanthi malai Kohalpurko chok ma
1 kartun raksi khaya maile risko jhokma

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of “ALPHA”

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney

Trailer Mixed & Mastered by: Abhishek Khandelwal (YRF Studios), Dileep Nair (Assistant Engineer - YRF Studios)
Trailer Background Music: Jamaican (Bam Bam)
Artist: HUGEL & SOLTO (FR)
Master: MoBlack Records
Publishers: Westbury Music Ltd., Prophesy Music Publishing and Abood Music Ltd.
Music Recreated by: Rohansh & Abeer

Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

© Yash Raj Films Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: Bandhu 2.0 | Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika| Pritam | Kavita | Neeraj | Irshad K | Cocktail 2 | 19th June
snippet.description:
Tumhi din chadhe, tumhi din dhale,
Tumhi ho bandhu, sakha tumhi! 💃

Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna are back with ‘Bandhu 2.0’ from ‘Cocktail 2’! Composed by Pritam, penned by Irshad Kamil and sung by Kavita Seth and Neeraj Shridhar, get ready to get back in time and groove with it!

#Bandhu2.0 #Cocktail2 #ShahidKapoor #KritiSanon #RashmikaMandanna 

🎧 Song Credits 
Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon & Rashmika Mandanna 
Directed by : Amar Kaushik
Singer: Kavita Sheth and Neeraj Shridhar
Music Composer: Pritam Chakraborty 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil
Mixed and Mastered by - Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Assistant to Eric Pillai - Michael Edwin Pillai

#Cocktail2, releasing in cinemas on 19th June 2026

🎬 Video Credits
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
Directed By: Homi Adajania 
Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan and Ankur Garg 
Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja
Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
Director of Choreography: Jaani Master
Publicity Design: Himanshu & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

Lyrics:
Yaara tere sadke
Ishq sikha main toh aayi jag tajh ke
Ishq sikha
Main toh yaara tere sadke
Main toh aayi jag tajh ke
Ishq sikha
Jab yaar kare parwah meri
Mujhe kya parwah iss duniya ki
Jag mujhpe lagaaye pabandhi
Main hoon hi nahi iss duniya ki
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Everytime every minute of the day
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Dil ki takhti par hoon likhti
Ishqan ishqan
Jag kya jaane dil ko mere
Ishqan kiska
Dil ki takhti par hoon likhti
Ishqan ishqan
Jag kya jaane dil ko mere
Ishqan kiska
Rabb yaar gale le saar meri
Mujhe kya parwah iss duniya ki
Tu jeet meri jag haar meri
Main hoon hi nahi iss duniya ki
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Nahi Hosh Tu Mujhe Thaamle
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi

snippet.description:

snippet.title: Katar Katarma - Mahesh Kafle & Asmita Adhikari | Nischal Basnet | Official Remake Music Video
snippet.description:
Presenting the official music video for "Katar Katarma," a brilliant new remake track performed by the hit duo Mahesh Kafle and Asmita Adhikari. Featuring an exceptional performance by Nischal Basnet, Loonibha Tuladhar and  Rachana Neupane, this upbeat and energetic Nepali song blends infectious rhythms with a lively story. Dive into the celebration and dance along!

snippet.title: Welcome To The Jungle - Official Trailer | In Cinemas Now
snippet.description:
Film? Bilkul Fake! Danger? Ekdum Real! Survival Skills? Zero!

Tension out, jungle madness in! Welcome To The Jungle where the mission is unpredictable, the madness is nonstop, and the chaos has a wild side!

#WelcomeToTheJungle, in cinemas now 🍿

Lyricist - Kumaar

Music Arranged And Programmed By Dj Phukan

Harmonium By Aditya Oke 
Sarangi By Murad Ali Khan

Cast - Arjun Kapoor & Shraddha Kapoor

Director - Mohit Suri

snippet.title: 9th Anniversary Animation Trailer এসে গেছে! 🎉
snippet.description:
9th Anniversary Animation Trailer এসে গেছে! 🎉

Free Fire-এর ৯ম জন্মদিন একদম কাছেই, আর এবার জেগে উঠতে যাচ্ছে নতুন এক শক্তি... 👀

প্রস্তুত হোন নতুন স্কিল, নতুন কমব্যাট সম্ভাবনা আর আরও শক্তিশালী ব্যাটেলের জন্য। 🔥

আপনি কোন ধরনের স্কিল আপগ্রেড দেখতে চান?

সাথেই থাকুন Full Animation এবং 9th Anniversary-এর আরও চমকের জন্য।

#FreeFire9 #FreeFire9thAnniversary #Booyah

snippet.title: MAA KA SAYA I माँ का साया I OFFICIAL TRAILER I ANJANA SINGH I BHOJPURI MOVIE 2026
snippet.description:
#anjanasingh #bhojpurimovie #rakeshbabu  #maakasaya #bhojpurimovie #trailer #trending 

 IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH RAAKI FILMS LLP

फ़िल्म - माँ का साया

कलाकार - अंजना  सिंह  , राकेश  बाबू  , भूपेंद्र  सिंह  , कंचन  मिश्रा  , अयाज़  खान  की  सी .पी भट्ट , निशा  सिंह  , श्वेता  यादव, रिंकू  आयुषी  , सुरेंद्र  कुमार  त्रिपाठी  , स्वेता  यादव  
बाल कलाकार  – ढोलू  , पल्लवी

कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह

निर्देशक – प्रवीण कुमार गुडूरी

लेखक - सत्येंद्र सिंह

संगीतकार- ओम झा

संकलन - प्रीतम नायक

छायांकन- महेंद्र मंगती (माही )

ट्रेलर - धरम सोनी  
मारधार    – दिनेश  यादव   
कोरियोग्राफर - प्रवीण सालार
एसोसिएट डायरेक्टर  – रवि  तिवारी  , सुवेश , मेज़र , अमन  सिंह  
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन -बॉलीवुड उमंग

आर्ट डायरेक्टर – शिवा जयसवाल
पब्लिसिटी डिज़ाइनर : देवा आर्ट ( सूरज गिरी )
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, अथर्व सिंह

 म्यूजिक – IVY MUSIC 
,सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी


B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 

मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय , विशाल यादव


B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे
ऑफिस बॉय - कन्हैया झा

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट -  फाइनेंस  

प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , , हिमांशु चौधरी

B4U - फाइनेंस

संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , 

FILM- MAA KA SAYA 

STARCAST- ANJANA SINGH , RAKESH BABU , BHUPENDRA SINGH , KANCHAN MISHRA , AYAZ KHAN C.P BHATT, NISHA SINGH , SHWETA YADAV ,RINKU AYUSHI , SURENDRA KUMAR TRIPATHI , SWETA YADAV

snippet.title: Mirzapur The Movie Teaser REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Mirzapur The Movie Teaser Review by Deeksha Sharma. Pankaj Tripathi with Ali Fazal & Divyenndu is back with Mirzapur Universe in the same timeline but with new Storytelling Old Rivalry & New Surprises, Violence To The Next Level with Hook Crook Grey Shade Character- Mirzapur the Movie will challenge Rocking Star Yash Toxic & Shraddha Kapoor Eetha at bollywood box office collection numbers. Mirzapur Teaser Reaction & Full Movie Trailer Expectations would be shared in this Video. Can Munna Bhaiya Save the Franchise One More time? Do leave Comments below.

#MirzapurTheMovie #MirzapurTheMovieTeaser #MirzapurTeaser

দাবিত্যাগ: - এই চ্যানেল কোনো অবৈধ কার্যকলাপকে প্রচার বা উৎসাহিত করে না। এই চ্যানেলের সমস্ত বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক এবং তথ্যমূলক উদ্দেশ্যে তৈরি। 

কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ: - কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (FAIR USE) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার, যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহার ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের পক্ষে ভারসাম্য রক্ষা করে।

চ্যানেল ডিসক্লেইমার – কমিকভার্স হলো একটি পপ কালচার কমেন্টারি ও ফিল্ম রিভিউ চ্যানেল, যা ফ্যান থিওরি, ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ এবং ট্রেলার রিভিউয়ের জন্য উৎসর্গীকৃত। কমিকভার্স চ্যানেল মাঝে মাঝে ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ, ট্রেলার এবং গান সম্পর্কে ব্যাখ্যা করার জন্য ফিল্ম ক্লিপ, টিভি সিরিজ ক্লিপ, ওয়েব সিরিজ ক্লিপ, অ্যানিমেশন সিরিজ ক্লিপ ব্যবহার করে থাকে, কিন্তু কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (ফেয়ার ইউজ) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়।

snippet.title: Evergreen Romantic Bollywood Songs | ANDAAZ AAYEGA MAZA AB BARSAAT KA | Hindi Love Hits
snippet.description:
Experience beautiful romantic video status clips featuring intimate couple moments and scenic backdrops. Perfect for finding your next inspiration.

This video showcases a collection of romantic couple scenes set against serene water and indoor landscapes. If you enjoy aesthetic visuals paired with meaningful lyrics like Teri Meri Dilkash Mulagaat Ka, this compilation captures the essence of longing and passion. It is designed for anyone looking for high-quality romantic song editing references or simply wanting to enjoy heartfelt cinematic moments.

Each scene highlights the connection between the couple, focusing on emotional intimacy and visually striking environments. Whether you are searching for new love lyrics status ideas or appreciate the art of capturing emotional storytelling, these clips provide a comprehensive look at how to frame passionate couple moments effectively.

Subscribe for weekly romantic video status updates and comment below which type of couple aesthetic you want to see in our next feature.

snippet.title: Aarzu (with Asim Azhar) Official Music Video | Asim Azhar, Noor, Khan, Madhurxo
snippet.description:
If Aarzu found a place in your heart, Asim Azhar's rendition takes it even deeper. Wrapped in dreamy melodies and timeless emotion, this version captures the beauty of yearning for someone who never truly leaves.


Listen Now:
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/1GnZH0wek1fkGCQnUsK6D0?si=c8a640db631c4690 Apple Music -  https://music.apple.com/in/song/aarzu-with-asim-azhar/6772998267 
YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=M5OCLifZK1w&si=F6FdB9DEXBskKoUu 

Audio Credits: 
Music by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Lyrics by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Vocals by Asim Azhar, Khan, Madhurxo
Written by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Produced by Noor
Guitars by Melvin Arthur
Mixed & Mastered by Kumail Abbas

Video Credits: 
Director - Khizar Sheikh
Producer - Syed Jahanzaib Ali
Executive Producer - Gul-E-Rana
D.O.P & Edit - Fraz KB 
Grade - Maaz Ahmad Ansari

Lyrics:

(Khan)

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

(Madhurxo)

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

(Asim Azhar)

Oh kaisi dilkashi 
Tujh se dillagi
Mere humnasheen… hmmmm
Kioun chupaoun main
Ab koi darr nahi
Tu jaisay meri pari
Masoomiyut chulkay teri
Baatoun se kitni…hayee
Saada si jo adaa’ein teri
Qatil hai woh
Dil ki meri

Peechay dekhoun raahein teri
Yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

(Unknown)

Phirse Bolo

(Asim Azhar)

Peechay dekho raahein teri
Yaad jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

(Khan and Asim)

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

(Outro)

Dono jahan teri muhabbat mein haar ke
Woh ja raha hai koi Shab’e Ghum guzaar ke
Weera’an hai maikada khum-o-saagar udaas hain     
Tum kya gaye k rooth gaye din bahaar

Connect: 
Asim Azhar ( https://www.instagram.com/asimazhar/?hl=en)
Khan (https://www.instagram.com/soundslikekhan/)
Noor (https://www.instagram.com/noor_wav/)
Madhurxo (https://www.instagram.com/madhuraaara/)

#AsimAzhar #Aarzu #PakistaniPop #DesiMusic #NewMusic #IPop 

(C) 2026 Asim Azhar

snippet.title: Nachau Jhumera - Yogesh Lama | Lamu Sherpa | Ft. Bhimphedi Guys | Sanjana Gurung | Sagar | Rushlal
snippet.description:
🎵 "Nachau Jhumera" is an energetic dance song performed by Yogesh Lama and Lamu Sherpa. Written, composed, and arranged by Yogesh Lama, the song features catchy melodies and an engaging musical arrangement. Directed by Nirmal Kumar Lama, with choreography by Bhimphedi Guys and Sagar Lopchan, the video brings together the performances of Sanjana Gurung, Bhimphedi Guys, Sagar Lopchan, Rushal Syangbo and Rupchen Tamang, creating an entertaining visual and musical experience.

Directed by Nirmal Kumar Lama, with choreography by Bhimphedi Guys and Sagar Lopchan, the video brings together the performances of Sanjana Gurung, Bhimphedi Guys, Sagar Lopchan, Rushal Syangbo and Rupchen Tamang, creating an entertaining visual and musical experience.

snippet.title: Mashooqa (Full HD Video) Kriti Sanon, Shahid Kapoor, Rashmika Mandanna | Cocktail 2 Songs | Pritam
snippet.description:
Presenting the sizzling track "Mashooqa" from the highly anticipated romantic drama 'Cocktail 2'! Get ready to groove to this ultimate modern vibe composed by the hit machine Pritam and Mahmood, bringing a fresh wave of energy to your playlist. 

Hit 'LIKE' if you are playing this on loop, and don't forget to SUBSCRIBE for more exclusive tracks!


Track Credits:
🎤 Singers: Pritam, Mahmood, Amitabh Bhattacharya, Raghav Chaitanya, Ruaa Kayy
🎵 Music Composer: Mahmood, Pritam
✍️ Lyricist: Mahmood, Amitabh Bhattacharya
🎬 Music Label: Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd. / Maddock Films Pvt. Ltd.

Movie Credits:
🎬 Movie: Cocktail 2
⭐ Starring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna, Dimple Kapadia, Rohit Saraf, Ishita Dutta
🎬 Director: Homi Adajania
💼 Producer: Dinesh Vijan (Maddock Films)
✍️ Writer: Luv Ranjan, Tarun Jain
📅 Theatrical Release Date: June 19, 2026

Lyrics:

Sai mi chiedo perché mi seduci quando ti avvicini 
Parli con la gente non capisco mai
Perché Lo fai 
Sembriamo amici Che finiranno nei guai 

(Come Get Me Now)x4

(Karein toh karein kya dil hai ..
Come get me Now 
Dil hai tabhi mushkil hai
Come get me Now ..) ×2

CROSS
Pade agar tere liye
Mar bhi jaana

Uff nahin kare deewana

Ma Ma Maashooqa
O My Mashooqa

Teer teri nazron ka
Toh kabhi na chooka

Ma ..
Ma ma ma Maashooqa

O my Maashoqa
Teer teri nazron ka

Na kabhi chooka
Haye haye haye ..

ANTARA

Teer-e-nazar ka banaya tu ne
Jise bhi nishaana
Jaane kyon chaah ke bhi
Chaahe na vo ख़ुद ko bachana

Jise gale se ik PAL ke liye BHI tu laga le
Poori umar uss PAL mein
बिता le vo deewaana

Kaam deevanon ka
Hosh gavana hai
Aur haseenon pe
Dosh lagana hai 

Ma ..
Ma ma ma Maashooqa

O my Maashoqa
Teer teri nazron ka

Na kabhi chooka

Baby cosa c’è 
Parlami di te 

Resta fuori con me nel week end 

Baby non lo so
Forse partirò 
Dammi un segno 
Perché in fondo 
Tu qua vicino dimmi cosa ci fai 
Mi chiedi baby quanti  posti vedrai 

Andiamo nei 
BRUNEI 
Uk
LA
SE SAI 
DI FAKE 
ti saluterò

snippet.title: Leher (Official Video) Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika | Pritam, Arijit Singh, Amitabh B | Cocktail 2
snippet.description:
Let this pyaar ki Leher wash over you 🥰✨

#Leher Song out now!

#arijitsingh #Cocktail2 in Cinemas Now!!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎧 Song Credits 
➟ Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon & Rashmika Mandanna
➟ Directed by : Homi Adajania
🎤 Singer: Arijit Singh
🎶 Music Composer: Pritam Chakraborty 
➟ Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya

#Cocktail2, In cinemas now 

🎬 Video Credits
➟ Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
➟ Directed By: Homi Adajania 
➟ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan and Ankur Garg 
➟ Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
➟ Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

➟ Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
➟ Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly 
➟ Publicity Design: Himanshu & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lyrics : 

Leher leher..
Behti ho ke saahil se bekhabar
Theher theher..
Kar lamhe kaise bante ye peher

Milte nahin hum agar
Milte nahin hum agar

Geela hua jo tera badan
Bheega na jaane kyun mera mann

Yun to ye nazdeekiyan dono ki bewajah bhi hain
Inmein par jitna takalluf hai utna maza bhi hai

Hoti bhala kaise feeke savere ki
Namkeen si dopaher dopaher
Milta humein kaise dil ke veerane mein
Soya hua ek sheher

Leher leher..
Behti ho ke saahil se bekhabar
Theher theher..
Kar lamhe kaise bante ye peher

Milte nahin hum agar
Milte nahin hum agar…

Mujhe tujh mein
Tujhe mujh mein
Tanha sa mila humsafar

Aa chhupa loon
Tujhe mujh mein
Milein phir na milein hum agar

Tera tera tera tera main
Tera tera tera tera main
Tera tera tera tera main

Chaahe tootein sabhi kasmein
Par adhoora koi armaan na rahe

Tera tera tera tera main
Tera tera tera tera main
Tera tera tera tera main

Milte nahin hum agar
Milte nahin hum agar…

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Tere Paas Main|Main Vaapas Aaunga|@diljitdosanjh,@ARRahman,Imtiaz Ali,Irshad,Vedang,Sharvari,Deepali
snippet.description:
The unspoken promise of love. ❤️

Experience the heartfelt melody "Tere Paas Main" from the film Main Vaapas Aaunga. A soulful song that beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and the silent bond that keeps two hearts connected.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

snippet.title: Sannani | Bikash X Beon X Pawan | Dreamstage Production
snippet.description:
SANNANI (Official Music Video Release)  By Dreamstage Productions 
Subscribe to DreamStage Productions to stay updated with our latest music videos, exclusive releases, and exciting upcoming projects. Thank you for your support—more amazing content is on the way!
Stay tuned for future releases and be part of our musical journey.
https://www.youtube.com/@UCknIU_nxhciR_kaB7mONdwQ 

Presenting the official music video of "Sannani," one of the most viral Nepali TikTok songs, reaching over 20 million people across social media platforms. This track combines catchy melodies, energetic beats, and an experimental musical style to create a unique listening experience. Originally released as an audio track on May 20, 2026, "Sannani" quickly became a major TikTok sensation. 

Audio Credits:
Vocals: Bikash Chandra Thapa, Beon Beats, Pawan Chand
Studio : Dreamstage Recording Studios
Producer/mix-master: Beon Beats
Featuring: Bikash, Beon, Pawan 
Genre: Nepali Melodic Hip-Hop, Experimental Song
Music Video Official Release 2026
Ownership Protected by : SwarVision Entertainment Pvt. Ltd.  
If you enjoyed the song, don't forget to:
Like, Comment, Subscribe & Share with your friends. 

VIDEO CREDITS:
Production House: LOCOLIZE CREATIVES PVT. LTD.
Directed By: Bijesh Bajracharya & Aone Magar
Director of Photography (DOP): Sachet Kadel & Bijesh Bajracharya
Assistant Camera (AC): Ishwor Nagarkoti & NyamaSang Tamang
2nd Assistant Camera: Ganesh
Production Manager: Raman Khadgi
Production Assistants: Shristi Shrestha, Nirajan Adhikari & Estella Pujari

Meri Qabar Pe Aansu Bahane Aana, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate


🎶 Song Feel:
Romantic | Emotional | Deep Love | 90s Bollywood Vibes

📌 Recommended For:
90s Hindi Songs lovers, Romantic reels, Love status videos, Emotional edits, Bollywood nostalgic songs fans

Agar aapko ye gana pasand aaye to:
👍 Like karein
💬 Comment me apni feelings share karein
🔔 Channel ko subscribe karein
❤️ Is song ko apne pyaar ke saath share karein

snippet.title: Oasis Thapa -  Sakey / सके
snippet.description:
Sakey by Oasis Thapa  |  सके  [ Official Music Video ]

Hi! bhanna ta dherai kura bhanna man cha tara kaa bata po suru garney... A song written 3 years ago with 3 different version each year. Ek point ma ta laageko thyo hyaa ettikai haaldinchu ma kina etro mehenat gariraachu bhanera tara khai man le namaanney. Ajjai pugena, yo bhayena, tyo bhayena, yo ajjai better garna sakchu, I can polish this a lot more bhanney soch le 3 barsa laagyo yo geet release garna. I guess this urge to serve quality everytime is a gift and a curse but so far I'm super satisfied with the end craft. The whole entire team was teaming. Yesai sndarva ma I hope I get to release my songs more consistently which I've written for over 4 years. Some old and some recent. Life been nerfing me so much I'm just discovering esto ni hudo raicha bhanera. I be like f'k yeah new year new energy and motivation to do more and then every year life be like here hold this new L for now. K sikaauna khojeko ni tha chaina. Just weird. There has been a few blessings I've received which I'm super grateful for though. There's this strong sense to protect that unlike anything. So, yeah a little life update but I really hope I can keep serving for now. See you guys on the next one.

https://open.spotify.com/track/5P5m2swluasZrMNIsRShw4?si=96POEiDcR6yCDnBkxDz10Q

Sakey ta ma dine thiye
Bache kuche ka sara
Mero Maya timi lai
Mero Maya timi lai

Sochina kahilei timrai barey

Todera jodidai
Dhadkera rokidai
Tadpera jogidai
Sambhaalula

Jhutho aashaa jhutho sapanaa
lai parkhera
Adhuro chahaanaa apuraa bahaanaa 
lai samjhera

Baaki rahey 
Nisaasiyeko saasai jaleyra 
Bhymari jhai aago salki rahey
Chaati chhiya chhiya kharaani bhaye

Sake ta ma diney thiye
Bache kuchey ka saaraa
Mero maya timi lai
Mero maya timi lai

Timi lai ma
Timi

Doman bho mutu mero dui bhaagai anidho
Badliyo mausam mero ujeli dhaakiyo
Farkiyo baadal kaalo sang jhari orli
Sakhaapai mero haal chaalai bharam mai
Baache jhai bhaako cha maya
Kun kissa metaaye mandir kun jalaayera
Milcha aanandi yahaa? 

Sakye ta sakey ta
Sake ta ma
Sakeye ta sakey ta
Shakey ta ma

-------------------------------------------------------------

bn.description:
রোবলক্সে শিভাং-কে মৃত্যুদণ্ড দেওয়া হয়েছে!!

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার, যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

snippet.title: Tera Paisa Mera Paisa | Welcome To The Jungle | Akshay Kumar, Vikram Montrose, Farhad, Rubai, Meggha
snippet.description:
Tera paisa, mera paisa, iska paisa... PAISA PAISA PAISA!

Junglee Music presents 'Tera Paisa Mera Paisa' from the upcoming movie Welcome to the Jungle. This latest Bollywood song, sung by Akshay Kumar, Farhad Bhiwandiwala, Rubai and Vikram Montrose, turns the idea of paisa paisa into a high-energy musical celebration. With Akshay Kumar, Disha Patani, Suniel Shetty and Jacqueline Fernandez bringing the heat on screen, it is designed to make you smile, groove, and sing along. Watch and experience the latest musical madness from Welcome To The Jungle.

Advance Booking Open Now, book your tickets now: https://linktr.ee/WelcomeToTheJungleTickets

#WelcomeToTheJungle, paid previews begin 25th June, 7:30 PM onwards 🍿

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali 

#TeraPaisaMeraPaisa #AkshayKumar #DishaPatani #SunielShetty #JacquelineFernandez #NewSong #BollywoodSong #DanceSong #MovieSong #BollywoodNewSong #WelcomeToTheJungleSong

I can't move on, babydoll
Waitin' on calls, flippin' through stations

Whatever's been weighing you down

'Cause I never said never, and I barely ever lie

I didn't make it up, but you can't find it on a phone, or a globe
And I can take you with me if you really wanna go, oh, babydoll
I can't move on

Waitin' on calls, flippin' through stations
I'm outclassed and it's outrageous
And I'll take it all, babydoll

snippet.title: Salala Karnali | Pramod Kharel | Pramod & Parampara | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
A soulful tribute to the beauty of Karnali, "Salala Karnali" brings together the timeless voice of Pramod Kharel with the words and music of Suraj Thapa. Shot amid the breathtaking landscapes of Jumla, this song is a heartfelt celebration of love, land, and the spirit of the Karnali region.

🎵 SONG: Salala Karnali

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Czym jest Roblox? ROBLOX to wirtualny plac zabaw i warsztat online, gdzie dzieci w każdym wieku mogą bezpiecznie wchodzić w interakcje, tworzyć, bawić się i uczyć. Wyjątkowość ROBLOX polega na tym, że praktycznie wszystko w grze jest projektowane i konstruowane przez członków społeczności. Każdy gracz zaczyna od wyboru awatara i nadania mu tożsamości. Następnie może odkrywać ROBLOX — wchodząc w interakcje z innymi poprzez czatowanie, granie w gry lub współpracę przy kreatywnych projektach. Każdy gracz otrzymuje również własny, niezagospodarowany kawałek ziemi wraz z wirtualnym zestawem narzędzi, za pomocą którego może zaprojektować i zbudować cokolwiek zechce — czy to nawigowalny wieżowiec, działający helikopter, gigantyczny flipper, grę wieloosobową „Zdobądź Flagę” czy inne, jeszcze niewyobrażalne dzieło. Ta pierwsza wirtualna działka jest darmowa. Uczestnicząc w projekcie i budując fajne rzeczy, członkowie ROBLOX mogą zdobywać specjalne odznaki, a także dolary ROBLOX („Robuxy”). Mogą oni również przeglądać katalog online, aby kupić ubrania i akcesoria dla awatarów, a także wysokiej jakości materiały budowlane, interaktywne komponenty i działające mechanizmy.

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX — berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun — baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

nl-NL.title: $8.592.683 uitgegeven in Roblox Keyboard Escape!
nl-NL.description:
Vandaag heb ik Roblox +1 keyboard escape gespeeld! Kijk de hele video om te zien wat er gebeurt.

Roblox-naam: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Wat is Roblox? ROBLOX is een online virtuele speelplaats en werkplaats waar kinderen van alle leeftijden veilig kunnen spelen, creëren, plezier hebben en leren. Het is uniek omdat vrijwel alles op ROBLOX is ontworpen en gebouwd door leden van de community. Elke speler begint met het kiezen van een avatar en het geven van een identiteit. Vervolgens kunnen ze ROBLOX verkennen en interactie hebben met anderen door te chatten, games te spelen of samen te werken aan creatieve projecten. Elke speler krijgt ook een eigen stuk onontwikkeld virtueel land, samen met een virtuele gereedschapskist waarmee ze van alles kunnen ontwerpen en bouwen – of het nu een begaanbare wolkenkrabber, een werkende helikopter, een gigantische flipperkast, een multiplayer 'Capture the Flag'-spel of een andere, nog te bedenken creatie is. Dit eerste stuk virtuele land is gratis. Door deel te nemen en coole dingen te bouwen, kunnen ROBLOX-leden speciale badges en ROBLOX-dollars ('Robux') verdienen. te.title: Roblox Keyboard Escape లో $8,592,683 ఖర్చు చేస్తున్నాను!
te.description:

మెర్చ్: https://foltyn.shop/

ప్రత్యేక ప్రయోజనాలను పొందడానికి ఈ ఛానెల్‌లో చేరండి:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--సోషల్ మీడియా--

డిస్కార్డ్: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

రోబ్లాక్స్ గ్రూప్: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

రోబ్లాక్స్ పేరు: TheRealFoltyn

ఇన్‌స్టా: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

ట్విట్టర్: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

రోబ్లాక్స్ అంటే ఏమిటి? రోబ్లాక్స్ అనేది ఒక ఆన్‌లైన్ వర్చువల్ ఆట స్థలం మరియు వర్క్‌షాప్. ఇక్కడ అన్ని వయసుల పిల్లలు సురక్షితంగా ఒకరితో ఒకరు సంభాషించుకోవచ్చు, సృష్టించుకోవచ్చు, ఆనందించవచ్చు మరియు నేర్చుకోవచ్చు. ROBLOX లో దాదాపు ప్రతిదీ కమ్యూనిటీ సభ్యులచే రూపొందించబడి, నిర్మించబడటమే దీని ప్రత్యేకత. ప్రతి ఆటగాడు ఒక అవతార్‌ను ఎంచుకుని, దానికి ఒక గుర్తింపును ఇవ్వడంతో ప్రారంభిస్తాడు. ఆ తర్వాత వారు చాటింగ్ చేయడం, ఆటలు ఆడటం లేదా సృజనాత్మక ప్రాజెక్టులపై కలిసి పనిచేయడం ద్వారా ఇతరులతో సంభాషిస్తూ ROBLOX ను అన్వేషించవచ్చు. ప్రతి ఆటగాడికి వారి స్వంత అభివృద్ధి చెందని భూభాగంతో పాటు, ఒక వర్చువల్ టూల్‌బాక్స్ కూడా ఇవ్వబడుతుంది. దానితో వారు దేనినైనా డిజైన్ చేసి నిర్మించవచ్చు — అది ప్రయాణించగల ఆకాశహర్మ్యం కావచ్చు, పనిచేసే హెలికాప్టర్ కావచ్చు, ఒక పెద్ద పిన్‌బాల్ మెషిన్ కావచ్చు, మల్టీప్లేయర్ “క్యాప్చర్ ది ఫ్లాగ్” గేమ్ కావచ్చు లేదా ఇంకా ఊహించని మరేదైనా సృష్టి కావచ్చు. ఈ మొదటి వర్చువల్ భూభాగానికి ఎటువంటి ఖర్చు ఉండదు. పాల్గొనడం ద్వారా మరియు అద్భుతమైన వస్తువులను నిర్మించడం ద్వారా, ROBLOX సభ్యులు ప్రత్యేక బ్యాడ్జ్‌లతో పాటు ROBLOX డాలర్లు (“రోబక్స్”) సంపాదించవచ్చు. దానికి బదులుగా, వారు ఆన్‌లైన్ కేటలాగ్‌లో షాపింగ్ చేసి అవతార్ దుస్తులు మరియు యాక్సెసరీలతో పాటు ప్రీమియం నిర్మాణ సామగ్రి, ఇంటరాక్టివ్ భాగాలు మరియు పనిచేసే యంత్రాంగాలను కొనుగోలు చేయవచ్చు.

ما هي روبلوكس؟ روبلوكس عبارة عن منصة ألعاب افتراضية تفاعلية، حيث يمكن للأطفال من جميع الأعمار التفاعل بأمان، والإبداع، والاستمتاع، والتعلم. ما يُميز ROBLOX هو أن كل شيء تقريبًا فيه مُصمم ومُنشأ من قِبل أعضاء المجتمع. يبدأ كل لاعب باختيار شخصية افتراضية (أفاتار) وتحديد هويتها. بعد ذلك، يُمكنه استكشاف عالم ROBLOX والتفاعل مع الآخرين عبر الدردشة، أو لعب الألعاب، أو التعاون في مشاريع إبداعية. كما يُمنح كل لاعب قطعة أرض افتراضية غير مُطورة، بالإضافة إلى مجموعة أدوات افتراضية لتصميم وبناء أي شيء، سواءً كان ناطحة سحاب قابلة للاستكشاف، أو طائرة هليكوبتر عاملة، أو آلة بينبول عملاقة، أو لعبة "الاستيلاء على العلم" متعددة اللاعبين، أو أي ابتكار آخر لم يخطر على بال أحد. هذه القطعة الأولى من الأرض الافتراضية مجانية. من خلال المشاركة وبناء أشياء رائعة، يُمكن لأعضاء ROBLOX ربح شارات مميزة، بالإضافة إلى عملة ROBLOX (روبوكس). وبدورهم، يُمكنهم استخدام هذه العملة للتسوق من المتجر الإلكتروني لشراء ملابس وإكسسوارات لشخصياتهم الافتراضية، بالإضافة إلى مواد بناء مميزة، ومكونات تفاعلية، وآليات عاملة.

ml.title: Roblox Keyboard Escape-ൽ $8,592,683 ചിലവാക്കുന്നു!
ml.description:
ഇന്ന് ഞാൻ റോബ്ലോക്സ് +1 കീബോർഡ് എസ്കേപ്പ് കളിച്ചു! എന്താണ് സംഭവിക്കുന്നതെന്ന് കണ്ടെത്താൻ മുഴുവൻ വീഡിയോയും കാണുന്നത് ഉറപ്പാക്കുക.

വ്യാപാരം: https://foltyn.shop/

പെർക്കുകൾ ആക്‌സസ് ചെയ്യാൻ ഈ ചാനലിൽ ചേരുക:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

റോബ്ലോക്സ് ഗ്രൂപ്പ്: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

റോബ്ലോക്സ് പേര്: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

ട്വിറ്റർ: https://twitter.com/Foltynn

എന്താണ് Roblox? എല്ലാ പ്രായത്തിലുമുള്ള കുട്ടികൾക്ക് സുരക്ഷിതമായി ഇടപഴകാനും സൃഷ്ടിക്കാനും ആസ്വദിക്കാനും പഠിക്കാനും കഴിയുന്ന ഒരു ഓൺലൈൻ വെർച്വൽ കളിസ്ഥലവും വർക്ക്‌ഷോപ്പുമാണ് ROBLOX. ROBLOX-ലെ പ്രായോഗികമായി എല്ലാം കമ്മ്യൂണിറ്റിയിലെ അംഗങ്ങൾ രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്ത് നിർമ്മിച്ചതാണ് എന്നതാണ് ഇതിന്റെ പ്രത്യേകത. ഓരോ കളിക്കാരനും ഒരു അവതാർ തിരഞ്ഞെടുത്ത് അതിന് ഒരു ഐഡന്റിറ്റി നൽകിക്കൊണ്ടാണ് ആരംഭിക്കുന്നത്. തുടർന്ന് അവർക്ക് ROBLOX പര്യവേക്ഷണം ചെയ്യാൻ കഴിയും - മറ്റുള്ളവരുമായി ചാറ്റ് ചെയ്തുകൊണ്ടോ, ഗെയിമുകൾ കളിച്ചോ, അല്ലെങ്കിൽ സൃഷ്ടിപരമായ പ്രോജക്റ്റുകളിൽ സഹകരിച്ചോ ഇടപഴകി. ഓരോ കളിക്കാരനും അവരുടേതായ വികസിപ്പിക്കാത്ത റിയൽ എസ്റ്റേറ്റ് കഷണം നൽകുന്നു, അതോടൊപ്പം എന്തും രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്യാനും നിർമ്മിക്കാനും ഒരു വെർച്വൽ ടൂൾബോക്സും നൽകുന്നു - അത് ഒരു നാവിഗേറ്റ് ചെയ്യാവുന്ന അംബരചുംബി, പ്രവർത്തിക്കുന്ന ഹെലികോപ്റ്റർ, ഒരു ഭീമൻ പിൻബോൾ മെഷീൻ, ഒരു മൾട്ടിപ്ലെയർ "ക്യാപ്ചർ ദി ഫ്ലാഗ്" ഗെയിം അല്ലെങ്കിൽ മറ്റേതെങ്കിലും, ഇതുവരെ സ്വപ്നം കാണാത്ത സൃഷ്ടി. വെർച്വൽ ഭൂമിയുടെ ഈ ആദ്യ പ്ലോട്ടിന് യാതൊരു ചെലവുമില്ല. പങ്കെടുക്കുന്നതിലൂടെയും രസകരമായ കാര്യങ്ങൾ നിർമ്മിക്കുന്നതിലൂടെയും, ROBLOX അംഗങ്ങൾക്ക് സ്പെഷ്യാലിറ്റി ബാഡ്ജുകളും ROBLOX ഡോളറുകളും ("Robux") നേടാൻ കഴിയും. അതാകട്ടെ, അവതാർ വസ്ത്രങ്ങളും അനുബന്ധ ഉപകരണങ്ങളും വാങ്ങാൻ ഓൺലൈൻ കാറ്റലോഗിൽ നിന്ന് ഷോപ്പുചെയ്യാനും പ്രീമിയം നിർമ്മാണ സാമഗ്രികൾ, സംവേദനാത്മക ഘടകങ്ങൾ, പ്രവർത്തന സംവിധാനങ്ങൾ എന്നിവ വാങ്ങാനും കഴിയും.

snippet.title: PES 2021 Season Update 2026 | Portugal 🇵🇹 vs Uzbekistan 🇺🇿 | FIFA World Cup 2026 Simulation Gameplay
snippet.description:
Portugal vs Uzbekistan — FIFA World Cup 2026 Simulation (PES 2021 Season Update)

Witness the showdown between the European giants, Portugal, and the determined squad of Uzbekistan in this FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage clash! This simulation brings the energy of the world’s biggest tournament to life in eFootball PES 2021, featuring the latest 2026 Season Update patches, updated international rosters, and authentic broadcast-style presentation.

Can Portugal’s star-studded lineup maintain their momentum, or will the resilient Uzbek side put up a fight to remember? Watch the full tactical breakdown in this CPU vs. CPU simulation to see how the match unfolds on the pitch!

🎮 Gameplay Details:

Tournament: FIFA World Cup 2026™ (Group Stage)

Matchup: Portugal 🇵🇹 vs. Uzbekistan 🇺🇿

Game: eFootball PES 2021 (Modded / 2026 Season Patch)

Format: Full Match Simulation (CPU vs. CPU)

🔔 Enjoying the World Cup 2026 simulation series? Don't forget to smash the LIKE button, drop your real-life score predictions in the comments, and SUBSCRIBE for more daily World Cup action!

#PES2021 #FIFAWorldCup2026 #PortugalVsUzbekistan #Portugal #UzbekistanFootball #PESMods #FootballSimulation

snippet.title: The Neighbourhood - Sweater Weather (Lyrics + Letra)
snippet.description:
🩸Lyrics →
All I am is a man
I want the world in my hands
I hate the beach, but I stand
In California, with my toes in the sand

Use the sleeves of my sweater
Let's have an adventure
Head in the clouds, but my gravity's centered
Touch my neck and I'll touch yours
You in those little high waisted shorts, oh

She knows what I think about
And what I think about
One love, two mouths
One love, one house
No shirt, no blouse
Just us, you find out
Nothing that wouldn't wanna tell you about no

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

And if I may just take your breath away
I don't mind if there's not much to say
Sometimes the silence guides our minds
To move to a place so far away

The goosebumps start to raise
The minute that my left hand meets your waist
And then I watch your face
Put my finger on your tongue, 'cause you love to taste, yeah

These hearts adore
Everyone the other beats hardest for
Inside, this place is warm
Outside, it starts to pour

Coming down
One love, two mouths
One love, one house
No shirt, no blouse
Just us, you find out
Nothing that I wouldn't wanna tell you about, no, no, no

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater, ooh, ooh

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
Let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

It's too cold
It's too cold
The holes of my sweater

৫ গাইজ মেকা ক্যামেলিয়ন চ্যালেঞ্জ

snippet.title: Unstable SMP: Purgatory
snippet.description:
Purgatory is the largest prison in all of Minecraft. Over 1,000 players on the Unstable SMP have been trapped inside, but today, I plan to face off against Jamato and free every last player.


This is the revolution. The Purgatory Finale




Unstable SMP Members
➜ @wemmbumc
➜ @FlameFragsMC
​⁠ ➜ @ParrotX2
​⁠ ➜ @Spokeishere






possible spoilers below this point

Features: @jumperwho @MapiccMc @jamatopecan


Music in this video:
Christopher Larkin
@ivoryfrill  &  @MythrodakTV  
DM DOKURO /  @DMDOKURO  
Pascal Stiefel /  @Plasma3Music  
Lena Raine / @LenaRaine 
C418 / @C418
Welcome to Mafia Town by Pascal Michael: A Hat in Time https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w1-lGNJADnw 
Tick Tock by Pascal Michael: A Hat in Time https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=As5j57PGviQ 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, and ParrotX2 aim to tell the best stories possible. btw a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

spoke

लो-फाई भजन पारंपरिक भक्ति संगीत को लो-फाई संगीत के सुखदायक, उदासीन गुणों के साथ जोड़ता है। इसमें शांत धुन और कोमल लय होती है जो शांति और आध्यात्मिक चिंतन की भावना पैदा करती है। वाद्य-यंत्र में अक्सर तबला, हारमोनियम, सितार और बांसुरी जैसे ध्वनिक वाद्य शामिल होते हैं, जो विनाइल क्रैकल या परिवेशी ध्वनियों जैसे सूक्ष्म लो-फाई तत्वों पर परतदार होते हैं। स्वर, चाहे एकल हों या कोरस, दिल से भावनाओं के साथ भक्ति गीत प्रस्तुत करते हैं, जो एक ध्यानपूर्ण और चिंतनशील मूड को प्रोत्साहित करते हैं। यह संलयन एक अनूठा सुनने का अनुभव बनाता है जो प्राचीन आध्यात्मिक परंपराओं को समकालीन लो-फाई सौंदर्यशास्त्र के साथ मिलाता है, जो आंतरिक सद्भाव और श्रद्धा में एक शांत यात्रा प्रदान करता है।

A lo-fi bhajan combines traditional devotional music with the soothing, nostalgic qualities of lo-fi music. It features serene melodies and gentle rhythms that evoke a sense of peace and spiritual contemplation. The instrumentation often includes acoustic instruments like tabla, harmonium, sitar, and flute, layered over subtle lo-fi elements such as vinyl crackles or ambient sounds. The vocals, whether solo or in chorus, deliver devotional lyrics with heartfelt emotion, encouraging a meditative and reflective mood. This fusion creates a unique listening experience that merges ancient spiritual traditions with contemporary lo-fi aesthetics, offering a tranquil journey into inner harmony and reverence.

लो-फाई भजन पारंपरिक भक्ति संगीत को लो-फाई संगीत के सुखदायक, उदासीन गुणों के साथ जोड़ता है। इसमें शांत धुन और कोमल लय होती है जो शांति और आध्यात्मिक चिंतन की भावना पैदा करती है। वाद्य-यंत्र में अक्सर तबला, हारमोनियम, सितार और बांसुरी जैसे ध्वनिक वाद्य शामिल होते हैं, जो विनाइल क्रैकल या परिवेशी ध्वनियों जैसे सूक्ष्म लो-फाई तत्वों पर परतदार होते हैं। स्वर, चाहे एकल हों या कोरस, दिल से भावनाओं के साथ भक्ति गीत प्रस्तुत करते हैं, जो एक ध्यानपूर्ण और चिंतनशील मूड को प्रोत्साहित करते हैं। यह संलयन एक अनूठा सुनने का अनुभव बनाता है जो प्राचीन आध्यात्मिक परंपराओं को समकालीन लो-फाई सौंदर्यशास्त्र के साथ मिलाता है, जो आंतरिक सद्भाव और श्रद्धा में एक शांत यात्रा प्रदान करता है।

A lo-fi bhajan combines traditional devotional music with the soothing, nostalgic qualities of lo-fi music. It features serene melodies and gentle rhythms that evoke a sense of peace and spiritual contemplation. The instrumentation often includes acoustic instruments like tabla, harmonium, sitar, and flute, layered over subtle lo-fi elements such as vinyl crackles or ambient sounds. The vocals, whether solo or in chorus, deliver devotional lyrics with heartfelt emotion, encouraging a meditative and reflective mood. This fusion creates a unique listening experience that merges ancient spiritual traditions with contemporary lo-fi aesthetics, offering a tranquil journey into inner harmony and reverence.

snippet.title: Manjurinama Deuna Maichyang || Bishwo Dong & Alina Yonjan || New Selo Song 2026/2082
snippet.description:
🎶 Presenting New Selo Song 2026/2082
"Manjurinama Deuna Maichyang" by Bishwo Dong & Alina Yonjan.
Hope you all enjoy this beautiful selo audio song. 
Don’t forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more new Tamang songs. ❤️

🎧 Song : Manjurinama Deuna Maichyang
🎤 Vocal : Bishwo Dong / Alina Yonjan
✍️🎼 Lyrics / Music / Arrange : Bishwo Dong
🎚 Mixing / Mastering : Dipesh Pradhan (Deep Studio)
🎙 Studio : Dong Studio
🤝 Supporter : Lal Dhoj Tamang

© All Rights Reserved

🔔 Subscribe for more new Tamang Selo songs
👍 Like | Comment | Share

#ManjurinamaDeunaMaichyang
#BishwoDong
#AlinaYonjan
#TamangSeloSong
#NewSeloSong2026
#NepaliSong
#TamangSong
#DongStudio
----------------------------------------------------
१.केटा :
मञ्जुरीनामा देउन मैच्याङ , तिम्रै वरिपरि बस्न लाई २
डाहा त गर्ने दुनियाँ सामु , मायाको डोरी कस्न लाई २
दिलै खोली मन साटेर , मलाई छेउ कुना बस्न देउ १
शंकले होईन मायाले , यो च्याङ्बालाई स्विकारि देउ २

१.केटी :
राजिनामा पेश गर्छु म त , च्याङ्बाको यस्तो पारा लाई
सोमात भन्ने केही छैन , तामासा देखाउँछ सारा लाई
किन पो बस्नु मेरो छेउ , यो झ्यान नभै नामसारी 
खुस्केको होकि त्यो दिमाग , शंका नै लाग्छ गरि गरि

२.केटा :
च्याङ्बाको कुरा सुन मैच्याङ , मायामा गरौं गठ्बन्धन २
धर्ती फाट्ला आकाश खस्ला , छुट्दैन मायाको यो बन्धन २
पागल उपाधी दिन्छ यहाँ , मायाले मनको कुरा बोल्दा १
घुम्स्याई नराख त्यो माया , के नै जान्छ र दिल खोल्दा २
२.केटी :
रंग न ढंग को कुरा गर्छ , छेउ टुप्पो केही नमिल्ने 
दश बित्ते मान्छे तीस बित्ते फुँई , कसरी मैले पत्याउने
बाउ बाजेको इज्जत नफाल , आफ्नो छैन भन्दामा 
सोचेको होला मीठो कुरा गरि , मैच्याङ्लाई पारौंला फान्दामा



३.केटा :
आत्मालाई साक्षी राखेर मैच्याङ , मायाको तामसुक लेखौंला २
दफा दफामा मायाको बयान , मायाकै कानुन मानौँला २
जान अन्जानमा गल्ती भए , भोग्नलाई तयार छु सजाय १
इमान्दारी मेहनेती , च्याङ्बाको अर्को परिचय २

३.केटी :
नापीको हाकिम भन्दा जान्ने , कुराको कित्ता गर्न लाई
मायाको लाल पुर्जामा ,दम छैन विश्वास भर्न लाई
बेहोरा हेर्दा कैदि को जस्तो , यो बानी छिट्टै सुध्रियोस 
न्यायाधीश ले जस्तो मैले फेरि , बयान लिनु नपरोस् 


----------------------------------------------------
►TIMESTAMPS 
0:00 - Story  
0:00 - Song Start
0:00 - Last Story
0:00 - Credits Parts
----------------------------------------------------
Please, Subscribe to My YouTube Channel
https://www.youtube.com/@BishwoDong
----------------------------------------------------
FOLLOW ME
----------------------------------------------------
Facebook 
https://www.facebook.com/bishwo.dong
Facebook Page 
https://www.facebook.com/dongbishwo
Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/bishwo.dong
Twitter(X)
https://twitter.com/bishwodong
Tiktok
https://www.tiktok.com/@bishwodong
----------------------------------------------------

*Uploading this video on other YouTube channels or Facebook pages without prior permission is strictly prohibited.*
(Link sharing and/or Embedding to websites is allowed)
----------------------------------------------------

आत्मालाई साक्षी राखेर मैच्याङ , मायाको तामसुक लेखौंला २
दफा दफामा मायाको बयान , मायाकै कानुन मानौँला २
जान अन्जानमा गल्ती भए , भोग्नलाई तयार छु सजाय १
इमान्दारी मेहनेती , च्याङ्बाको अर्को परिचय २

३.केटी :
नापीको हाकिम भन्दा जान्ने , कुराको कित्ता गर्न लाई
मायाको लाल पुर्जामा ,दम छैन विश्वास भर्न लाई
बेहोरा हेर्दा कैदि को जस्तो , यो बानी छिट्टै सुध्रियोस 
न्यायाधीश ले जस्तो मैले फेरि , बयान लिनु नपरोस्

ne.title: Manjurinama Deuna Maichyang || Bishwo Dong & Alina Yonjan || New Selo Song 2026/2082
ne.description:
🎶 Presenting New Selo Song 2026/2082
"Manjurinama Deuna Maichyang" by Bishwo Dong & Alina Yonjan.
Hope you all enjoy this beautiful selo audio song. 
Don’t forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more new Tamang songs. ❤️

🎧 Song : Manjurinama Deuna Maichyang
🎤 Vocal : Bishwo Dong / Alina Yonjan
✍️🎼 Lyrics / Music / Arrange : Bishwo Dong
🎚 Mixing / Mastering : Dipesh Pradhan (Deep Studio)
🎙 Studio : Dong Studio
🤝 Supporter : Lal Dhoj Tamang

© All Rights Reserved

🔔 Subscribe for more new Tamang Selo songs
👍 Like | Comment | Share

#ManjurinamaDeunaMaichyang
#BishwoDong
#AlinaYonjan
#TamangSeloSong
#NewSeloSong2026
#NepaliSong
#TamangSong
#DongStudio
----------------------------------------------------
१.केटा :
मञ्जुरीनामा देउन मैच्याङ , तिम्रै वरिपरि बस्न लाई २
डाहा त गर्ने दुनियाँ सामु , मायाको डोरी कस्न लाई २
दिलै खोली मन साटेर , मलाई छेउ कुना बस्न देउ १
शंकले होईन मायाले , यो च्याङ्बालाई स्विकारि देउ २

१.केटी :
राजिनामा पेश गर्छु म त , च्याङ्बाको यस्तो पारा लाई
सोमात भन्ने केही छैन , तामासा देखाउँछ सारा लाई
किन पो बस्नु मेरो छेउ , यो झ्यान नभै नामसारी 
खुस्केको होकि त्यो दिमाग , शंका नै लाग्छ गरि गरि

२.केटा :
च्याङ्बाको कुरा सुन मैच्याङ , मायामा गरौं गठ्बन्धन २
धर्ती फाट्ला आकाश खस्ला , छुट्दैन मायाको यो बन्धन २
पागल उपाधी दिन्छ यहाँ , मायाले मनको कुरा बोल्दा १
घुम्स्याई नराख त्यो माया , के नै जान्छ र दिल खोल्दा २
२.केटी :
रंग न ढंग को कुरा गर्छ , छेउ टुप्पो केही नमिल्ने 
दश बित्ते मान्छे तीस बित्ते फुँई , कसरी मैले पत्याउने
बाउ बाजेको इज्जत नफाल , आफ्नो छैन भन्दामा 
सोचेको होला मीठो कुरा गरि , मैच्याङ्लाई पारौंला फान्दामा



३.केटा :
आत्मालाई साक्षी राखेर मैच्याङ , मायाको तामसुक लेखौंला २
दफा दफामा मायाको बयान , मायाकै कानुन मानौँला २
जान अन्जानमा गल्ती भए , भोग्नलाई तयार छु सजाय १
इमान्दारी मेहनेती , च्याङ्बाको अर्को परिचय २

३.केटी :
नापीको हाकिम भन्दा जान्ने , कुराको कित्ता गर्न लाई
मायाको लाल पुर्जामा ,दम छैन विश्वास भर्न लाई
बेहोरा हेर्दा कैदि को जस्तो , यो बानी छिट्टै सुध्रियोस

en.description:
Presenting the official music video of "संगै जिउने (Sangai Jiune)", a heartfelt romantic Nepali song celebrating love, togetherness, and lifelong companionship.

Nawaraj Thapa Magar 
Melina Rai

Ganeshman Ghale 
Alina Gurung

Pawan Susling

🎨 Color: 
Pawan Susling

🖥️ Poster/Edit: 
Asim Chandra Bishwokarma

Padma Entertainment

🎧 Studio: 
Mahol Studio

snippet.description:
Music: https://songwhip.com/shakira/dai-dai

Letra/Lyrics: 
Oe oe e oe Oe oe e oe
You knew from the day you were born
That here in this place you belong
You been this brave all along
What broke you once made you strong

Dai dai iko
Dale ale lets go

Dale ale lets go!

Come follow your desire
Theres a will there way
You are the owner of that fire
No one can take it away
Sweat and blood to write your story
That is how you paved the way
You are about to reach the glory
Only one step away

All the highs and lows
All the tears and the pain
You been there thru it all
Been thru it all
Just do it again
Now you got to believe (I believe)
Cuz you know what it takes
To be living the dream
At top of your game.

Feel it, got everything you needed
now bring it like you mean it
just like you mean it
Dale, no olvides lo que vales
Juega como tu sabes
Como tu sabes.

Energy is contagious you know
And it never fails no no
No one’s getting tired I know
Cuz you got that fire eio
Dream a little higher
Lets go lets go lets go
We’ve taken all that our hearts can hold
We can’t hold on to the past no more
From the dirt and the tears you make gold
You are more than flesh and bone

snippet.title: Sujan Chapagain | Gajale Sunchari [ गाजले सुनचरी ] ArtMandu | Travel Song | Feat. Sampada & Samishan
snippet.description:
Sujan Chapagain | Gajale Sunchari [ गाजले सुनचरी ] ArtMandu | Travel Song | Feat. Sampada & Samishan

Chitwan ❤️
the place where I took my first breath, walked my first steps, discovered the world for the first time, and heard my first music. Today, with love and gratitude for that homeland, I am proud to present my travel song, “Gajale Sunchari.”

This song is dedicated to all the wandering souls who love to travel freely, explore new places, and discover the beauty of life along the way.


Audio Credits

Lyrics
Hark Saud

Vocal & Music
Sujan Chapagain

Poem
Pallawib

Music Producer/Mixing/Mastering
Kobid Bazra

Strings Orchestration and Recordings
Bikesh Bazra

Tabla
Jagannath Dhaugoda

Keys
Anish (Dotted Nose)

Flute
Ratna BK 

Sarangi
Prince Nepali

Guitars
KobidBazra
Bikesh Bazra
Sanjeev Baraili

Violin
Roshna Shakya
Roman Budhathoki

Cello
Nishad Shrestha
Drums
Bikesh Bazra 

Back Vocals
Kriti Nepali

Recording Engineer
Kobid Bazra
Bikesh Bazra 

Studio Production Manager
Kriti Nepali

Music Produced at 
Bajra Creation Records

Special Thanks
Sumit Pathak
River Bank Jungle Resort
Yudin Shrestha
Subodh Dahal
Saubhagya Mahato
Rakesh Maharjan
Prawin Takki Karki
Chintan Rajbhandari
Ritesh Jung Kshetri
Resham Adhikari
Chandra Kanta Sapkota
Nabaraj Belbase
Akash Nepali
Sandesh Chapagain
Hotel Meghauli Safari
InterContinental Chitwan Meghauli Resort
The Local Kitchen
The Box Sauraha
Pratik Chaudhary
Saroj Chaudhary
Sudip Bhandari
Anushri Lama
And the people of Chitwan.

Cultural Partner
Kha Maaja

Video Credits

Cast
Sampada Ghimire
Samishan GC

Drone/Additional Cinematographer
Nitesh Chaudhary

Line Producer
Jayesh Chaudhary

Cinematographer
Sabin Lingdam Limbu (Pyatuu)

Editor/Colorist
Raywot Shrestha

Publicity Designer
Karyalaya Inc.

Directed By
Abhishek Subedi

Produced At
ArtMandu

🎮 চ্যানেল সম্পর্কে: 
সুজালিসলাইভ একটি হিন্দি গেমিং চ্যানেল, যেখানে আমি রোবলক্সের উপর বিনোদনমূলক এবং গল্প-নির্ভর ভিডিও আপলোড করি। এই মুহূর্তে, আমি **রোবলক্স ব্লক্স ফ্রুটস**-এর উপর মনোযোগ দিচ্ছি — এটি রোবলক্সের অন্যতম জনপ্রিয় ওয়ান পিস-অনুপ্রাণিত একটি গেম, যেখানে আপনি বসদের সাথে লড়াই করেন, লেভেল আপ করেন এবং সবচেয়ে শক্তিশালী খেলোয়াড় হয়ে ওঠেন। 

আপনি নতুন বা অভিজ্ঞ, যাই হোন না কেন, এখানে আপনি মজার মুহূর্ত, গ্রাইন্ডিং টিপস এবং দুর্দান্ত সব লড়াই খুঁজে পাবেন — সবই হিংলাশে। জিটিএ ৬ এবং তার পরবর্তী গেমগুলোর জন্য একটি অনুগত গেমিং দর্শক তৈরি করার এই যাত্রায় আমার সাথে যোগ দিন!

கடைசியாக.. எனக்கு நிரந்தர கட்டுப்பாட்டுப் பழம் (PERMANENT CONTROL FRUIT) கிடைத்துவிட்டது + இது ப்ளாக்ஸ் ஃப்ரூட்ஸ் (Blox Fruits) விளையாட்டில் நடந்தது..! ☠️

+ 9 நாட்களாக வீடியோ வெளியிடாததற்கு மன்னிக்கவும், நிஜ வாழ்க்கை வேலையில் மிகவும் பிஸியாக இருந்தேன் + விரைவில் எனக்கு விடுமுறை வரவிருக்கிறது, எனவே காத்திருங்கள்!

எனது டிஸ்கார்ட் (Discord) இங்கே: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

it.title: FINALMENTE.. Ho ottenuto il FRUTTO PERMANENTE + È SUCCESSO questo in Blox Fruits..! ☠️
it.description:
FINALMENTE... Ho ottenuto il Frutto del CONTROLLO PERMANENTE! + Questo è successo in Blox Fruits..! ☠️

+ Scusate per i 9 giorni senza video, sono troppo impegnato con il lavoro nella vita reale + presto andrò in vacanza, quindi abbiate pazienza!

Ecco il mio Discord: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

bn.description:
রোবলক্সে ঘুমানোর ভান করুন অথবা মরে যান!!

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে “ন্যায্য ব্যবহার”-এর অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত এমন একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

bn.title: 🔴 GTA 5 লাইভ ২০২৬ | ক্রেজি মিশন, মজার মুহূর্ত এবং এপিক গেমপ্লে | PAJI লাইভে আছে
bn.description:
চূড়ান্ত GTA V লাইভ স্ট্রিমে আপনাকে স্বাগতম, যেখানে আমরা দ্রুতগতির গাড়ি নিয়ে রেস করি, লস স্যান্টোস ঘুরে দেখি এবং স্বচ্ছন্দ গেমপ্লের সাথে আনন্দ করি। আপনি যদি হাই-স্পিড রেস, সাবলীল ড্রাইভিং এবং আরামদায়ক গেমিং স্ট্রিম পছন্দ করেন, তাহলে আপনি সঠিক জায়গায় এসেছেন। লাইভ চ্যাটে যোগ দিন, রেসের পরামর্শ দিন এবং স্বচ্ছন্দ পরিবেশে অবিরাম GTA 5-এর মজা উপভোগ করুন। এই স্ট্রিমটি মূলত গতি, স্টাইল এবং কমিউনিটির সাথে আড্ডা দেওয়ার জন্য। চ্যানেলকে সমর্থন করতে এবং GTA V পরিবারের অংশ হতে স্ট্রিমটি লাইক, সাবস্ক্রাইব এবং শেয়ার করতে ভুলবেন না। #gta6

#gtav #gta5 #trolling #gaming
